name: Banana Split Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 pack French Vanilla instant pudding mix, 3 oz
12 ounces whipping cream or real whipped cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to package directions and let it cool.
2. Mix the dry pudding mix and cream cheese until well combined.
3. Gradually add milk a little at a time until smooth.
4. Spread the pudding mixture over the cooled cake.
5. Cover with drained pineapple chunks.
6. Cut bananas lengthwise and place them over the pineapple.
7. Cover with whipped cream or real whipped cream.
8. Top with cherries and nuts.
Bake in a large pan and leave it in the pan to keep all the toppings on the cake.
